chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. S–562 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection No.1 and reply as at A. 2. For orders on CMA No.4633/2025 3. For orders on CMA No.4634/2025 4. For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 None present. ------------------------------- No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing despite notice with note of caution. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
